mapper.select: SELECT nr.notification_recipient_id AS notificationRecipientId, n.notification_id AS notificationId, n.notification_type AS notificationType, n.notification_title AS notificationTitle, n.notification_content AS notificationContent, n.notification_sent_at AS notificationSentAt, nr.notification_is_read AS notificationIsRead, nr.notification_read_at AS notificationReadAt FROM notification_recipient nr JOIN notification n ON nr.notification_id = n.notification_id WHERE nr.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND nr.notification_is_hide = false ORDER BY n.notification_sent_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN nr.notification_is_read = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadCount FROM notification_recipient nr WHERE nr.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND nr.notification_is_hide = false
